description_long: This is a modern circular fountain set into a broad, flat, gray-tiled platform. At its center, a cluster of vertical water jets of varying heights creates a dynamic, spiky arrangement, with the tallest jets in the middle and shorter ones radiating outward. The jets emerge from a dark, circular basin, which is surrounded by a ring of small, colored lights embedded in the surface, adding a decorative and possibly functional illumination effect. The basin appears to be recessed into the platform, with a smooth, clean edge and no visible sculptural ornamentation. The overall design is geometric and contemporary, emphasizing symmetry and the visual impact of the water display. The surrounding area is plain, with no visible landscaping or additional urban features.
description: A circular, modern fountain with a cluster of vertical water jets in a recessed dark basin, surrounded by colored lights on a flat gray-tiled platform.
description_view_0: From this view, the central cluster of water jets and the colored lights encircling the dark basin are clearly visible, with the flat gray platform dominating the foreground.
description_view_1: This angle shows the same features, but the water jets' varying heights and the symmetry of the colored lights around the basin are more apparent.
description_view_2: The view highlights the recessed nature of the basin and the even distribution of jets and lights, with the platform's texture visible.
description_view_3: Similar to the previous views, this angle emphasizes the circular arrangement and the geometric layout of the jets and lights.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features a ring of small, colored lights embedded around the basin, providing a decorative accent. There are no visible sculptures, engravings, or elaborate motifs; the design is minimalist and geometric.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is circular, recessed into the platform, and bordered by a smooth, clean rim. It appears to be a single-tiered structure with no visible compartments or divisions.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: Multiple vertical water jets are arranged in a dense, circular cluster, with the tallest jets in the center and shorter ones radiating outward, creating a spiky, symmetrical spray pattern.
